aliases: Darfur theater of the Sudan war (2023-present)
family_summary: Subnational conflict family in western Sudan beginning with the 2003 SLM/A and JEM rebellion, peaking in the 2003-05 counterinsurgency against Darfurian communities, then fragmenting into insurgent, militia, inter-communal, and post-2023 RSF-SAF theater violence.
notes: This bundle prioritizes 2003-09 to 2004-12 because civilian direct violent mortality and affected-population denominators are best documented there. Later phases are episodeized but not fully estimated.
